import React from 'react'; import { Tab } from '@headlessui/react'; import { ArrowLeftIcon, PaperAirplaneIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; function classNames(...classes) { return classes.filter(Boolean).join(' '); } const UserDetails = ({ user, onBack }) => { const tabs = ['Activity', 'Schedule', 'Info']; if (!user) { return (
Select a user to view details
); } const getStatusColor = (status) => { switch (status) { case 'online': return 'bg-green-500'; case 'away': return 'bg-yellow-500'; case 'offline': return 'bg-gray-500'; default: return 'bg-green-500'; } }; const renderSocialIcon = (platform, link) => { if (!link) return null; const icons = { figma: { bg: 'bg-orange-500', text: 'F' }, github: { bg: 'bg-gray-700', text: 'G' }, twitter: { bg: 'bg-blue-500', text: 'T' }, slack: { bg: 'bg-purple-500', text: 'S' }, dribbble: { bg: 'bg-pink-500', text: 'D' } }; const icon = icons[platform]; if (!icon) return null; return (
{icon.text}
); }; return (
{/* Header */}

User Details

{/* User Info */}

{user.name}

{user.title}

{/* Social Icons */}
{Object.entries(user.socialLinks).map(([platform, link]) => renderSocialIcon(platform, link) ).filter(Boolean)}
{/* Message Input */}
{/* Tabs */} {tabs.map((tab) => ( classNames( 'w-full rounded-lg py-2.5 text-sm font-medium leading-5', 'ring-white ring-opacity-60 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-blue-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2', selected ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow' : 'text-neutral-400 hover:bg-white/[0.12] hover:text-white' ) } > {tab} ))} {/* Activity Content */}
WK

Working on {user.skills[0]} project

2:30 PM - 5:00 PM

Currently focused on {user.bio}

Started 30m ago • In Progress
MT

Team Meeting - {user.department}

10:00 AM - 11:00 AM

Weekly sync with the {user.department} team to discuss ongoing projects and priorities.

3h ago • Completed

Today's Schedule

Daily Standup 9:00 AM
{user.skills[0]} Review 2:00 PM
1:1 with Manager 4:00 PM

Contact Information

Email: {user.email}
Phone: {user.phone}
Location: {user.location}

Work Information

Department: {user.department}
Join Date: {new Date(user.joinDate).toLocaleDateString()}

Skills

{user.skills.map((skill, index) => ( {skill} ))}

Bio

{user.bio}
); }; export default UserDetails;
